name: ASUS PRIME B840M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7600+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-A - USB-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS PRIME B840M-A WIFI-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Compact Micro-ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with B840 chipset, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 6E for budget-conscious builders.
